title: Cristal y Lavisa S.A. de C.V. ransomware incident

victim.name: Cristal y Lavisa S.A. de C.V.

extortion.description: [AI generated] Cristal y Lavisa S.A. de C.V. is a Mexican company specializing in the production and distribution of glass products. Known for its high-quality glassware, the company serves various industries, including construction, automotive, and consumer goods. With a focus on innovation and customer satisfaction, Cristal y Lavisa has established a strong presence in the domestic and international markets.
